overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a dirt path through rural countryside. The character travels from a rocky trail section through open fields with a distant castle visible, approaching a village with thatched-roof buildings and sunflowers.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky countryside trail with wooden fencing

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path with two swords strapped to his back, passing wooden stakes on the left

entered.detail: winding dirt trail through the countryside
steep earthen cliff face with exposed rock and grass
vertical wooden posts lining the left side of the path
tall coniferous trees in the background
dense green grass and vegetation flanking the trail

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a narrow dirt trail bordered by a rocky cliff on the right and wooden stakes on the left. The path winds through dense vegetation and pine trees under a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with distant castle view

events.description: distant stone castle becomes visible on the horizon as the landscape opens up

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking as the terrain opens to reveal expansive grasslands and a distant castle silhouette

entered.detail: large stone castle or keep visible on the distant horizon
open field of tall grass replacing the rocky cliff
bushes with white flowers lining the path

segments.scene_description: The path opens into wide grasslands as the rocky terrain falls away. A distant stone castle appears on the horizon, and white flowering bushes line the trail while Geralt continues forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: village approach with cultivated sunflowers and thatched buildings

events.description: approaching rural village with thatched-roof structures and cultivated sunflowers visible

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking toward the village outskirts, passing sunflowers and wooden fences with a thatched cottage visible ahead

notable_agents.action: flock of birds flying overhead in the sky

entered.detail: traditional building with straw thatched roof
tall yellow sunflowers cultivated alongside the path
rustic wooden fencing marking property boundaries

segments.scene_description: The trail approaches a rural settlement with thatched-roof buildings and cultivated sunflowers lining the path. Wooden fences mark the boundaries of properties while birds fly overhead and the distant castle remains visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: village outskirts with traditional wooden architecture

events.description: passing closer to thatched buildings with dense vegetation on the right

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing through the village outskirts with traditional wooden and thatched structures visible on both sides of the trail

entered.detail: cluster of traditional village buildings with straw roofs

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks deeper into the village outskirts, passing close to thatched-roof buildings and dense shrubs. The wooden fences are now closer to the path, and the distant castle fades from view as the trail continues through the settlement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as Geralt travels from a confined rocky trail into the open countryside and finally into a rural village. It begins on a narrow dirt path bordered by a rocky cliff and wooden stakes, winding through dense vegetation and pine trees under a clear blue sky. As the rocky terrain falls away, the scene opens into wide grasslands lined with white flowering bushes, revealing a stone castle on the distant horizon. The trail then leads toward a settlement where cultivated sunflowers and wooden fences appear, while birds fly overhead against the backdrop of the far-off castle. Finally, the camera moves deeper into the village outskirts, passing close to thatched-roof buildings and dense shrubs as the distant castle fades from view.
